body:
I suspect that with this change, our distributed tests will fail (possibly, because of a bug with julia 1.10.5 that is used on the caltech cluster, cc @vchuravy). 

This reinstates https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4085, which we reverted on #4082.

cc @giordano
title: Make the `OceananigansReactantExt` depend explicitly on KA
